data.title: WeRide Robotaxi Launches on Tencent Mobility Service, Expanding Access to Driverless Rides Across China
data.description: WeRide has strengthened its collaboration with Tencent Cloud by incorporating its Robotaxis with the Tencent Mobility Service mini program on WeChat. This strategic partnership aims to combine WeRide's autonomous driving technology with Tencent's popular platform to enhance the overall mobility experience for users. The integration of WeRide's Robotaxis with Tencent Cloud's services signifies a significant milestone in the advancement of autonomous driving technology. This move is expected to provide a seamless and efficient transportation solution for users, with the potential to reach a wide audience through the extensive reach of WeChat.

data.title: Green Dot Delays Earnings Release
data.description: Green Dot Corporation (NYSE: GDOT) from Provo, Utah, has postponed the announcement of its financial results for Q4 and the full year of 2025. The release, originally planned for March 12, 2026, has been delayed as the company finalizes its annual audit. Green Dot anticipates revealing its earnings report alongside the submission of its Form 10-K for the period ending December 31, 2025. Green Dot Corporation, a financial technology platform, is set to disclose its financial status soon.

data.title: Oil prices remain stable despite Trump's lifting of sanctions on some Russian crude; surged 10% to little effect.
data.description: Following a 10% surge on Thursday, oil prices remained relatively unaffected by President Trump's announcement to waive sanctions on the sale of certain Russian crude.

data.title: White House requests ABC to retract report on Iran drone threat, citing unverified FBI tip. Iran deploys drones after US and Israel attacks.
data.description: Authorities have disclosed that the FBI alert referenced by the network was based on an unconfirmed tip. This development coincides with Iran's deployment of drones throughout the Middle East in response to recent military actions by the United States and Israel.

data.title: New voice agent platform by Together AI features sub-700ms latency, integrates with Deepgram and Cartesia for enterprise use.
data.description: The new unified voice agent infrastructure developed by Together AI has been launched with seamless integration of Deepgram and Cartesia. This launch is aimed at enterprise deployments and ensures end-to-end latency of less than 700 milliseconds.

data.title: Cygnus intends to advance resource evaluation and technical studies following successful A$25m placement
data.description: The recent fundraising was met with significant interest from major shareholders, resulting in a discounted price set at 6% below the closing value. Currently, there are three rigs actively drilling at the Golden Eye gold-copper discovery site. Additionally, there are plans to explore and test several new significant targets in the next quarter.
